positive: Minimalist celestial fox spirit silhouette, standing poised in a field of glowing, stylized cherry blossoms and ethereal mist. The fox has flowing, stylized fur that blends with the surrounding magical glow. The composition must be central, featuring deep indigo and turquoise blues contrasted with vibrant pops of magenta, gold leaf accents, and soft ivory. Use a highly decorative, Art Nouveau aesthetic with clean lines and high contrast. Full view, suitable for apparel print, vector graphic style, intricate pattern elements, symmetrical composition, octane render, high detail.
